channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Fable and Mythos officially too dangerous to release
item.description: [AINews] Fable and Mythos officially too dangerous to release

item.title: [Hacker News] Open Source AI Must Win
item.description: Open Source AI Must Win

item.title: [Hacker News] We've suspended access to Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5
item.description: We've suspended access to Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5

item.title: [Anthropic] Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
item.description: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5

item.title: [Simon Willison] OpenAI WebRTC Audio Session, now with document context
item.description: OpenAI WebRTC Audio Session, now with document context

item.title: [Hacker News] Show HN: Putt.day a daily mini golf game
item.description: Show HN: Putt.day a daily mini golf game

item.title: [Hacker News] Palantir loses legal challenge against Swiss investigative magazine
item.description: Palantir loses legal challenge against Swiss investigative magazine

item.title: [Anthropic] TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries
item.description: TCS and Anthropic partner to bring Claude to regulated industries

item.title: [Hacker News] "Don't You Just Upload It to ChatGPT?"
item.description: "Don't You Just Upload It to ChatGPT?"

item.title: [Hacker News] How to setup a local coding agent on macOS
item.description: How to setup a local coding agent on macOS

item.title: [Anthropic] Results from first Anthropic Public Record
item.description: Results from first Anthropic Public Record

item.title: [Hacker News] Slightly reducing the sloppiness of AI generated front end
item.description: Slightly reducing the sloppiness of AI generated front end

item.title: [GitHub Trending] iptv-org/iptv — Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world
item.description: iptv-org/iptv is a GitHub repository collecting publicly available IPTV channels from worldwide sources.

item.title: [GitHub Trending] LMCache/LMCache — LMCache: Supercharge Your LLM with the Fastest KV Cache Layer
item.description: LMCache is a KV cache optimization layer for improving LLM inference efficiency.

item.title: [Hacker News] Ryanair dark UX patterns summer 2026 refresher
item.description: Ryanair dark UX patterns summer 2026 refresher

item.title: [Hacker News] The Future of Email
item.description: The Future of Email

item.title: [OpenAI] New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
item.description: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

item.title: [Hacker News] Digital Sovereignty Becomes an Imperative as the US Reads Dutch Emails
item.description: Digital Sovereignty Becomes an Imperative as the US Reads Dutch Emails

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] Loopcraft: The Art of Stacking Loops
item.description: [AINews] Loopcraft: The Art of Stacking Loops

item.title: [Hacker News] AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42
item.description: AI agent bankrupted their operator while trying to scan DN42

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Accurate and Resource-Efficient Federated Continual Learning
item.description: FedRAN reduces communication costs in federated continual learning from quadratic to linear while improving accuracy and supporting label scarcity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OmniLoc: A Geometry-Aware Foundation Model for Anchor-Free UE Localization Across Diverse Indoor Environments
item.description: OmniLoc, a foundation model for indoor localization using wireless measurements, employs geometry-aware Transformers for anchor-free positioning across diverse environments.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Probabilistic Contrastive Pretraining for Multi-task ADME Property Prediction
item.description: Probabilistic contrastive pretraining with graph transformers improves ADME property prediction for drug discovery.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SirenFNO: Efficient and Full Frequency Learning of Fourier Neural Operators
item.description: SirenFNO uses sinusoidal networks to improve Fourier neural operators, eliminating frequency truncation while achieving 4-73x parameter reduction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Counterexample Guided Learning in the Large using Reasoning Agents
item.description: Structured counterexample feedback enables LLMs to learn regex patterns more efficiently, boosting success rates from under 4% to 74%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] APEX: A Network-Native Time-Series Foundation Model for Forecasting and Anomaly Detection for Wireless Edge Operations
item.description: APEX, a network-native transformer, improves wireless network telemetry forecasting by 18% over baselines while enabling privacy-preserving edge inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GraphInfer-Bench: Benchmarking LLM's Inference Capability on Graphs
item.description: GraphInfer-Bench benchmarks LLMs' ability to infer answers from graph neighborhoods that cannot be retrieved from single nodes or paths.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Range-Aware Bayesian Optimization for Discovering Diverse Designs within Target Property Windows
item.description: Range-aware Bayesian optimization discovers multiple diverse designs satisfying target property ranges more efficiently than standard optimization baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond the Golden Teacher: Enhancing Graph Learning through LLM-GNN Co-teaching
item.description: LLM-GNN co-teaching framework enables bidirectional supervision through exchanged pseudo-labels for few-shot learning on text-attributed graphs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Kuramoto Attention: Synchronizing Self-Attention on the Torus
item.description: Kuramoto Attention implements self-attention via phase states and Kuramoto coupling equations, matching RoPE transformer performance on character-level language modeling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-Distilled Neural Network enabled by Large Language Models for Manufacturing Process-Property Predictive Modeling
item.description: Framework integrates LLM-extracted physics knowledge into lightweight neural networks for robust manufacturing process-property prediction in data-scarce scenarios.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Information-Theoretic Decomposition for Multimodal Interaction Learning
item.description: Paper proposes DMIL, a framework that explicitly decomposes and adaptively learns sample-specific multimodal interactions to address limitations in ensemble and joint learning approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DeMix: Debugging Training Data with Mixed Data Error Types by Investigating Influence Vectors
item.description: DeMix framework uses influence vectors to simultaneously detect erroneous training samples and classify their error types across multiple datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TimeRouter: Efficient and Adaptive Routing of Time-Series Foundation Models
item.description: TimeRouter efficiently routes forecasting tasks across time-series foundation models using lightweight discriminative routing instead of expensive LLM-based selection.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Context Returns: Toward Robust Internalization in On-Policy Distillation
item.description: Research identifies context-induced degradation in on-policy distillation and proposes a consistency regularizer to ensure student model robustness with reintroduced context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TAROT: Task-Adaptive Refinement of LLM-prior Graphs for Few-shot Tabular Learning
item.description: TAROT framework uses GNN-based semantic graphs refined from LLM priors to improve few-shot tabular learning performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Tree-Structured Orthonormal Decomposition of the Aitchison Simplex
item.description: PolyILR provides an orthonormal decomposition of compositional data that preserves hierarchical tree structure and Aitchison geometry for improved microbiome and single-cell analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Structure-Preserving Neural Surrogates with Tractable Uncertainty Quantification
item.description: Neural surrogates preserve physical conservation structure and quantify uncertainty via Gaussian processes for real-time PDE solving.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] DeepRHP: A Hybrid Variational Autoencoder for Designing Random Heteropolymers as Protein Mimics
item.description: DeepRHP combines classical and feature-based VAEs to design random heteropolymers that effectively mimic protein behavior and function.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] IAPO: Input Attribution-Aware Policy Optimization for Tool Use in Small Multimodal Agents
item.description: IAPO improves tool-use in small multimodal language models by aligning input attribution with teacher models, boosting visual question-answering accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse probes and murky physics: a case study of interpretability challenges in a foundation model for continuum dynamics
item.description: Researchers using sparse autoencoders find a continuum dynamics model's internal mechanisms show only partial consistency with known physical principles.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Bergson: An Open Source Library for Data Attribution
item.description: Bergson, an open-source library, enables data attribution at scale for large language models to explain model behavior through training data influence.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Spectrally Regularized Latent Flow Matching for Turbulence Generation
item.description: A spectrally regularized latent flow matching framework improves turbulence generation by better preserving dissipation-range amplitudes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Noise-Aware Framework for Correcting Corrupted Labels
item.description: CANOLA framework corrects corrupted labels using noise-aware learning, achieving 19-52% improvement over existing methods.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Data-Centric Framework for Detecting and Correcting Corrupted Labels
item.description: Relabeler detects and corrects noisy training labels using local/global relationships, demonstrating 58% improvement in label correction precision.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RLCSD: Reinforcement Learning with Contrastive On-Policy Self-Distillation
item.description: RLCSD proposes contrastive on-policy self-distillation to improve reasoning models by reducing style drift and focusing learning on task-relevant tokens rather than stylistic ones.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Capacity-Constrained Online Convex Optimization with Delayed Feedback
item.description: Researchers propose algorithms for online convex optimization with delayed feedback under limited memory capacity constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ICA Lens: Interpreting Language Models Without Training Another Dictionary
item.description: ICALens uses Independent Component Analysis to interpret language models efficiently without training Sparse Autoencoders, enabling rapid model exploration.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RCAP: Robust, Class-Aware, Probabilistic Dynamic Dataset Pruning
item.description: RCAP, a class-aware dynamic dataset pruning algorithm, maintains worst-group accuracy while reducing computational cost across balanced and imbalanced datasets.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scalable Deep Learning Framework for Global High-Resolution Land Use Reconstruction
item.description: AI4Land is a deep learning framework that reconstructs high-resolution land use patterns for climate modeling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] EDEN: A Large-Scale Corpus of Clinical Notes for Italian
item.description: EDEN releases a 4-million-note Italian emergency department corpus with 6,000 expert-annotated notes to support medical LLM development.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Helping Figures Tell their Story! Paper-Grounded Video Generation Explaining Complex Scientific Figures
item.description: Method generates narrated videos explaining scientific figures with sequential region highlighting grounded to paper text.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MARD: Mirror-Augmented Reasoning Distillation for Mechanism-Level Drug-Drug Interaction Prediction
item.description: Researchers propose MARD, a 7B model for mechanism-level drug-drug interaction prediction that outperforms GPT-4o through reasoning distillation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Constrained Semantic Decompression in LLMs through Persian Proverb-Conditioned Story Generation
item.description: Researchers find LLMs fail to preserve moral meaning when generating narratives from Persian proverbs despite fluent output.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Shopping Reasoning Bench: An Expert-Authored Benchmark for Multi-Turn Conversational Shopping Assistants
item.description: Shopping Reasoning Bench, an expert-authored benchmark with 525 missions, evaluates multi-turn conversational shopping assistants; nine tested models achieve only 57-77% pass rates.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MentalMARBERT: Domain-Adaptive Pre-training and Two-Stage Fine-Tuning for Arabic Mental Health Disorders Detection
item.description: Researchers developed MentalMARBERT, a domain-adapted Arabic language model for mental health disorder detection from social media, achieving significant improvements over baseline models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Observable Patterns Are Not Explanations: A Causal-Geometric Analysis of Latent Reasoning Models
item.description: Observable patterns in latent reasoning models don't prove internal reasoning; causal interventions reveal graded thought effects concentrated in low-rank structures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] AfriSUD: A Dependency Treebank Collection for Evaluating Models on African Languages
item.description: AfriSUD introduces syntactically annotated treebanks for nine African languages, revealing significant limitations in current NLP models' ability to parse African language syntax.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Does AI Reviewer See the Full Picture? Attacking and Defending Multimodal Peer Review
item.description: Researchers introduce PaperGuard benchmark to evaluate vulnerabilities in AI peer reviewers against multimodal attacks targeting both text and scientific figures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Agent-based models for the evolution of morphological alternation patterns
item.description: Multi-agent simulation models how morphological alternations like "go/went" emerge and spread through language populations using LLM evaluation.
